title: Nostalgized
description: Experience the Xbox 360 Legacy Console Edition Again!
body:
# **Nostalgized**

**Nostalgized is made to recreate the Legacy Console Edition on the Xbox 360. Every mod helps your experience to make the modpack more accurate or for it to have better performance.**

### _____________________________________________________________________________________________

## 🔧 Settings
**⚙ Make sure to keep these specific settings to experience the full Modpack ⚙**

| Setting             | Nostalgized               | Default              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Resolution            | 720P              | 1080P             |
| Render Distance            | 10 Chunks              | 12 Chunks             |
| Simulation Distance            | 5 Chunks              | 12 Chunks             |
| Frames Per Second (FPS)            | 60 FPS              | 120 FPS             |
| Field Of View (FOV)            | 70 FOV              | 70 FOV             |
